components.value: V, S, M (mercury and phosphorus, plus powdered diamond and opal worth a total of 5,000 gp)

description.value: This spell functions like symbol of death, except that all creatures within the radius of the symbol of insanity instead become permanently insane (as the insanity spell). Unlike symbol of death, symbol of insanity has no hit point limit; once triggered, a symbol of insanity simply remains active for 10 minutes per caster level.
